name: health-check-cron

{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":115738,"duration_api_ms":111317,"num_turns":21,"result":"Step 3 complete. Here's what was implemented:

- **`POST /api/health/heartbeat`** — upserts a `system_health` row keyed by `cam_kind` with the current timestamp
- **`WebcamCapture.tsx`** — sends a heartbeat immediately on camera ready, then every 60s
- **`GET /api/cron/health-check`** — reads all `system_health` rows, enqueues an iMessage alert for any cam with `last_heartbeat_at` older than 15 minutes, returns `{ ok, alerts }`
- **Dashboard** — new System Status card shows each cam's last heartbeat time and an Online/Offline status pill
